Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher C. Dehner, Esq. of Jones Clifford, T:415.431.5310, for petitioner/moving party;
Rebecca Liu, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3870, for respondent/opposing party.

RULING: Hearing held and the matter was argued. At the conlcusion of arguments, PETITIONER GREGORY BLATMAN's Petition For Writ Of Mandate was taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
